title: 3Dshrooms
body: # _**3Dshrooms**_ Tired of the boring and flat mushroom texture of vanilla minecraft, then 3Dshrooms is for you. It adds 4 new 3D textures to red and brown mushrooms to add more variation to them. 3D version of all mushrooms so they are not just vanilla textures. **Works with 1.20 - 1.21** ### Before: ![Vanilla mushroom textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/832ea139ebaf1f64096ea8578209928cb18d7b2e.png) ### After: ![3D models of the mushrooms ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6addd68cc80ea991a98b3d535311a7a577754887.png)
